\"Record, when relevant, the start and t: "Rekhoda, lapho kufanelekile, usuku lokuqala nolokugcina lobudlelwano." (ISDF 6.3) Faka usuku ngendlela ofuna lubonakale ngayo ekhasini lokubuka lomsebenzi, usebenzisa izichasiso noma izimpawu zokubhala uma ufuna ukukhombisa ukungaqiniseki.
\"Use this note to record any other desc: "Sebenzisa leli nothi ukurekhoda olunye ulwazi oluchazayo olubhekwa njengolubalulekile kodwa olungangeni ezincazelweni zamanye amanothi." (RAD 1.8B21)
%1% draft(s) available (visit %2%newest: %1% okusalungiswa(s) kuyatholakala (visit %2%newest additions%3% ikhasi ku phequlula them)
%1% upload limit of %2% GB exceeded for: %1% layisha limit ye %2% GB exceeded ye %3%

%open_strong_tag%Note:%close_strong_tag%: %open_strong_tag%Qaphela:%close_strong_tag% I-AtoM ingase isuse amaphakheji okukhishwa ngemva kwesikhathi ukuze ikhulule indawo yokugcina. Uma okukhishiwe sekulungile kufanele ukulande ngokushesha ngangokunokwenzeka.
<strong>Label:</strong> Enter a name for:
Ilebula: Faka igama lenkambu yesihlonzi esihlukile elikhombisa injongo nokusetshenziswa kwayo.
Isihlonzi: Faka ikhodi yereferensi yakudala, isihlonzi esihlukile, noma olunye uchungechunge lwezinhlamvu nezinombolo oluhlobene nerekhodi.
A coded designation for the copyright st: A coded designation ye the ilungelo lobunikazi isimo ye the into at the time the isitatimende samalungelo is recorded.
A condition noma limitation ku the act.
A list of special chars, separated by co: A list ye special chars, separated by coma, ku be escaped ku string queries
A slug based on this name already exists: A slug based ku this igama already exists so a number has been added ku pad the slug.
A slug based on this title already exist: A slug based ku this isihloko already exists so a number has been added ku pad the slug.
Add an alpha-numeric code to uniquely id: Engeza ikhodi enezinhlamvu nezinombolo ukuze uhlonze ngokuyingqayizivele le nqolobane ye-OAI ngaphakathi kwendawo yayo yenethiwekhi, ukuze kudalwe isihlonzi esiyingqayizivele esihambisana ne-OAI, isb. oai:foo.org:repositorycode_10001
Add container links (duplicate links wil: Engeza container izixhumanisi (duplicate izixhumanisi kuzoba ignored)
Add your digital objects by dragging and: Engeza izinto zakho zedijithali ngokuhudula nokudedela amafayela endawo efasiteleni elingezansi, noma ngokuchofoza isixhumanisi sokuphequlula ukuze uvule isihloli samafayela sakho.
Additional information about the license: Ulwazi olwengeziwe mayelana nelayisense, njengabantu bokuxhumana, izinsuku zezenzo, noma izincazelo. Inothi lingabuye libonise indawo yelayisense, uma itholakala ku-inthanethi noma ifakwe ngaphakathi entweni uqobo.
All descendants or just digital objects: Konke descendants noma just izinto zedijithali
Allow any valid URI PATH segment charact: Vumela noma yiluphi uhlamvu oluvumelekile lwengxenye ye-URI PATH ukuba luvele ku-slug, kuhlanganise nama-glyph e-UTF-8. Izinhlamvu ze-IRI ezikhawulelwe ( /?#{} ) nezikhala zangempela zizoshintshwa zibe amadeshi
An API key must be sent in the HTTP requ: An API key kufanele kube sent ku the HTTP request ZZZ header ku authenticate requests
An identifying designation for the statu: An identifying designation ye the statute. Use standard citation form when applicable, e.g. bibliographic citation.
Any field except finding aid text: Any field except ithuluzi lokuthola amarekhodi text
Kusebenza kuphela kumasayithi anezinqolobane eziningi. Uma kusethwe ku-"yebo", izinketho ezengeziwe zokusesha nokuphequlula zizotholakala ezingeni lenqolobane
Are you sure you want to delete %1% and: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa %1% nakho konke okungaphansi kwayo?
Are you sure you want to delete the %1%: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa i-%1% exhunywe ku-%2%?
Are you sure you want to delete the find: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa ithuluzi lokuthola lika-%1%?
Are you sure you want to delete these ca: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa la magama-ncazo/imibhalo engezansi/izahluko?
Are you sure you want to delete this ref: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa lokhu kumelwa kwereferensi/isithonjana?
Are you sure you want to delete this rig: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa leli lungelo?
Are you sure you want to replace \"%1%\": Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukushintsha "%1%" ngo-"%2%" ku-%3%?
Authorized form of name - This is a mand: Ifomu eligunyaziwe legama - Le yingxenye ephoqelekile.
Basis for the permissions granted or for: Isisekelo sezimvume ezinikiwe noma sokuvinjelwa kwamalungelo
Bootstrap 2 themes have been deprecated: Izindikimba ze-Bootstrap 2 sezindala futhi zizosuswa ekukhishweni okuzayo. Sicela ucabange ukushintshela endikimbeni ye-Bootstrap 5. %1%Ulwazi olwengeziwe.%2%
Both source and replacement fields are r: Both umthombo futhi replacement fields are kuyadingeka.
CSV Validator default behaviour when CSV: CSV Validator default behaviour when CSV Ngenisa is run
CSV validation initiated. Check %1%job %: CSV validation initiated. Check %1%umsebenzi %2%%3% ku buka the results ye the validation.
Cache description XML exports upon creat: Cache incazelo XML exports upon creation/modification
Can be text value or URI (e.g. to Creati: Kungaba inani lombhalo noma i-URI (isb. ku-Creative Commons, GNU noma kwamanye amalayisense aku-inthanethi). Kusetshenziswa ukuhlonza isivumelwano sokunika imvume ngokuyingqayizivele ngaphakathi kohlelo lwenqolobane.
Cannot calculate accumulated dates becau: Cannot calculate accumulated izinsuku because cha lower level izinsuku exist
Cannot calculate accumulated izinsuku because this %1% has cha children
Check the %1% page to determine present: Check the %1% ikhasi ku determine present isimo. You can keep moving nodes if you don't reload the ikhasi. Once the ikhasi is reloaded, if a move umsebenzi hasn't ended, your recent change(s) may not yet be displayed futhi okusha changes may fail. After the move umsebenzi ends futhi the ikhasi is reloaded, the treeview kuzoba back ku a stable isimo.
Children inheriting rights from record:: Children inheriting rights kusuka ku irekhodi:
Choose the file format for generated Fin: Choose the ifayela format ye generated Amathuluzi okuthola amarekhodi (PDF noma 'Rich Text Format')
Choose whether permalinks for descriptio: Choose whether permalinks ye izincazelo are generated kusuka ku ikhodi yereferensi noma isihloko
Choosing \"Include descendants\" will in: Ukukhetha okuthi "Faka okusezingeni elingezansi" kuzofaka wonke amarekhodi asezingeni eliphansi angaphansi kwalawo asebhodini lokunamathisela kulokho okukhishwayo.
Choosing \"Include draft records\" will: Ukukhetha okuthi "Faka amarekhodi asalungiswa" kuzofaka lawo anesimo sokushicilelwa sokuthi Okusalungiswa kulokho okukhishwayo. Qaphela: uma UNGAKHETHI le ndlela, wonke amarekhodi angaphansi kwerekhodi elisalungiswa nawo azokhishwa, noma ngabe eseshicilelwe.
Choosing \"Include non-visible elements\: Choosing "Faka non-visible elements" will faka those not marked as Visible Elements.
Click 'Calculate dates' to recalculate t: Click 'Calculate izinsuku' ku recalculate the start futhi end izinsuku ye a parent-level incazelo. A umsebenzi runs ku the background, accounting ye the earliest futhi most recent izinsuku across konke the child izincazelo. The results bonisa ku the Start futhi End fields ye the hlela ikhasi.
Click Confirm to delete this physical st: Chofoza okuthi Qinisekisa ukuze ususe lokhu kugcinwa ngokomzimba ohlelweni. Lokhu kuzophinde kususe indawo yokugcina ngokomzimba kula marekhodi alandelayo:
Clipboard saved with %1% items. Clipboar: Ibhodi lokunamathisela kulondoloziwe nge %1% items. Ibhodi lokunamathisela ID is %2%. Sicela write this number down. When you want ku reload this ibhodi lokunamathisela ku the future, open the Ibhodi lokunamathisela imenyu, khetha Load ibhodi lokunamathisela, futhi faka this number ku the Ibhodi lokunamathisela ID field.
Content in this area will appear below a: Content ku this indawo will appear below an uploaded banner futhi above the isikhungo's incazelo areas. It kungaba used ku offer a summary ye the isikhungo's mandate, faka a tag line noma important ulwazi, etc. HTML futhi inline CSS kungaba used ku style the contents.
Creator: Umdali
DACS, 2nd ed. Society of American Archiv: DACS, 2nd ed. Society ye American Archivists
Date that the decision to ascribe the ri: Usuku okwenziwa ngalo isinqumo sokuhlobanisa ilungelo nalo mthetho. Lokhu kusebenzela umongo wanoma yikuphi ukubuyekezwa noma ukuchazwa kabusha kwesikhathi esizayo.
Dates of creation, revision and deletion: Izinsuku ye creation, ukubuyekezwa futhi deletion
%1% layisha limit ye a okusha %2%.  A value ye "0" (zero) disables ifayela layisha.  A value ye "-1" allows unlimited uploads okuzenzakalelayo
Default publication status for newly cre: isimo sokushicilelwa ye newly kudaliwe noma imported %1% okuzenzakalelayo
Delete an existing %1% to reduce disk us: Susa an okukhona %1% ku reduce disk usage
Delete current rights in descendants and: Susa kwamanje rights ku descendants futhi shintsha nge parent rights.
Delete matches and replace with imported: Susa matches futhi shintsha nge imported amarekhodi
Delete matches and replace with imports: Susa matches futhi shintsha nge imports
Describe the nature of the relationship: Describe the nature ye the relationship between the function futhi the related resource. (ISDF 6.2)
Determines whether to show a link to the: Determines whether ku bonisa a isixhumanisi ku the phequlula hierarchy ikhasi ku the ulwazi izinto phequlula/sesha pages
Determines whether to sort siblings in t: Determines whether ku sort siblings ku the ulwazi into treeview control futhi, if so, what sort criteria ku use
Did you follow a broken link?: Did you follow a broken isixhumanisi?
Digital objects with restricted access o: Izinto zedijithali ezinokufinyelela okukhawulelwe noma ilungelo lobunikazi ngeke zikhishwe.
Display Privacy Notification on first vi: Display Privacy Notification ku first visit ku site
Display multiple linked digital objects: Bonisa izinto zedijithali eziningi ezixhunywe nencazelo eyodwa yezinqolobane
Do not use any special characters or spa: Ungasebenzisi izinhlamvu ezikhethekile noma izikhala egameni lefayela - kuzolondolozwa kuphela izinhlamvu nezinombolo ezincane (a-z, 0-9) namadeshi (-). Ezinye izinhlamvu zizosuswa noma zishintshwe. Ukuhlela igama lefayela ngeke kubuyekeze ngokuzenzakalelayo ezinye izinkambu.

Ungasebenzisi izinhlamvu ezikhethekile noma izikhala ku-slug - kuzolondolozwa kuphela izinhlamvu nezinombolo ezincane (a-z, 0-9) namadeshi (-). Ezinye izinhlamvu zizosuswa noma zishintshwe. Ukuhlela i-slug ngeke kubuyekeze ngokuzenzakalelayo ezinye izinkambu.
Dublin Core, Version 1.1. Dublin Core Me: Dublin Core, Version 1.1. Dublin Core Imethadatha Initiative
Editing the authorized form of name will: Ukuhlela ifomu eligunyaziwe legama kuzobuyekeza ngokuzenzakalelayo inkambu ye-slug uma ibhokisi elithi "Buyekeza i-slug" likhethiwe - usengayihlela ngemva kwalokho.
Editing the description title will autom: Ukuhlela isihloko sencazelo kuzobuyekeza ngokuzenzakalelayo inkambu ye-slug uma ibhokisi elithi "Buyekeza i-slug" likhethiwe - usengayihlela ngemva kwalokho.
Email your <a href=\"mailto:%1%\">system: I-imeyili your umlawuli wohlelo futhi request a larger layisha limit
Enable or disable the display of certain: Vula noma khubaza ukuboniswa kwezingxenye ezithile zekhasi. Ngaphandle uma zishintshwe yindikimba ethile, lezi zilungiselelo zizosetshenziswa kuyo yonke isayithi.
Enter free-text information, including q: Faka ulwazi lombhalo ovulekile, kuhlanganise nezichasiso noma izimpawu zokubhala zokukhombisa ukungaqiniseki, ukuze ushintshe indlela usuku olubonakala ngayo. Uma le nkambu ingasetshenziswa, okuzenzakalelayo kuzoba iminyaka yokuqala neyokugcina kuphela.
Enter the ID of the saved clipboard you: Enter the ID ye the kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela you would like ku load.
Enter the ilungelo lobunikazi usuku lokugcina, if known. Acceptable usuku format: YYYY-MM-DD.
Enter the copyright start date, if known: Enter the ilungelo lobunikazi usuku lokuqala, if known. Acceptable usuku format: YYYY-MM-DD.
Enter the email address(es) of at least: Faka ikheli noma amakheli e-imeyili okungenani omlawuli oyedwa wenqolobane. Amakheli amaningi angafakwa, ahlukaniswe ngamakhoma. La makheli azovezwa njengengxenye yempendulo esicelweni se-Identify.
Enter the end year. Do not use any quali: Faka unyaka wokugcina. Ungasebenzisi izichasiso noma izimpawu zokubhala ukukhombisa ukungaqiniseki. Amafomethi osuku amukelekile: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, YYYY.

Enter the end year. Do not use any qualifiers noma typographical symbols ku express uncertainty. If the start futhi end years are the same, faka data only ku the "Usuku" field futhi leave the "Usuku lokugcina" blank.
Enter the start year. Do not use any qua: Enter the start year. Do not use any qualifiers noma typographical symbols ku express uncertainty.
Faka unyaka wokuqala. Ungasebenzisi izichasiso noma izimpawu zokubhala ukukhombisa ukungaqiniseki. Amafomethi osuku amukelekile: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, YYYY.
Error: You must have at least one %1%Lev: Iphutha: Kufanele ukhethe okungenani %1%Izinga lencazelo%2% elilodwa noma ukhethe %1%Faka wonke amazinga encazelo angaphansi%2% ukuze uqhubeke.
Escape special chars from searches: Escape special chars kusuka ku searches
External URL to send clipboard contents: External URL ku send ibhodi lokunamathisela contents ku
Files not uploaded successfully. Please: Amafayela not uploaded ngempumelelo. Sicela retry.
Files successfully uploaded! Press the \: Amafayela ngempumelelo uploaded! Press the \\'Ngenisa\\' button ku complete importing these amafayela.

Ithuluzi lokuthola amarekhodi model:

  throughout the ithuluzi lokuthola amarekhodi

Generate archival description reports as: Khiqiza incazelo yezinqolobane imibiko as public umsebenzisi
Google Maps Javascript API key (for disp: Google Maps Javascript API key (ye displaying dynamic maps)
HTTP method to use when sending clipboar: HTTP method ku use when sending ibhodi lokunamathisela contents

ISAAR(CPF), 2nd ed. International Counci: ISAAR(CPF), 2nd ed. International Council ku Archives

ISDIAH, 1st ed. International Council on: ISDIAH, 1st ed. International Council ku Archives
If \"no\", just show one OAI set per col: If "cha", just bonisa one OAI set per collection
If job hasn't already completed, check %: If umsebenzi hasn't already completed, check %1% ikhasi ku determine present isimo.
If no levels are selected, the export wi: Uma kungekho mazinga akhethiwe, ukukhishwa kuzohluleka. Ungasebenzisa okhiye be-control (Mac ⌘) kanye/noma u-shift ukuze ukhethe amanani amaningi kumenyu yamazinga encazelo. Kuyadingeka ukufaka izinga noma amazinga angaphezulu kwezinga ofuna ukulikhipha, kuze kufike futhi kufake izinga elisebhodini lokunamathisela. Kungenjalo, awekho amarekhodi azofakwa ekukhishweni.
If the finding aid is an uploaded PDF, t: If the ithuluzi lokuthola amarekhodi is an uploaded PDF, the transcript kuzoba kususiwe too.
If the page number does not exist, the d: If the ikhasi number does not exist, the derivative kuzoba generated kusuka ku the previous closest one.
If you are importing a SKOS file to a ta: If you are importing a SKOS ifayela ku a uhlelo lokuhlukanisa other than izihloko, sicela go ku the %1%
Ignore matches and create new records on: Ignore matches futhi dala okusha amarekhodi ku ngenisa
Ignore matches and import as new: Ignore matches futhi ngenisa as okusha
Import file initiated. Check %1%job %2%%: Ngenisa ifayela initiated. Check %1%umsebenzi %2%%3% ku buka the isimo ye the ngenisa.
In the \"Action\" selector, indicate whe: Kusikhethi esithi "Isenzo", bonisa ukuthi ufuna ukuhlanganisa ibhodi lokunamathisela elilondoloziwe nokufakiwe ebhodini lamanje noma ukushintsha (ukubhala phezu) ibhodi lamanje ngelilondoloziwe.
Incorrect ibhodi lokunamathisela ID futhi/noma action.
It has %1% descendants that will also be: It has %1% descendants that will also be kususiwe
It has %1% descendants that will also be kususiwe:
It is not possible to select both digita: Akunakwenzeka ukukhetha kokubili izinto zedijithali nezinto ezingezansi ukuze zikhishwe ngesikhathi esisodwa. Izinto zedijithali zingakhishwa kuphela kumarekhodi asebhodini lokunamathisela.
It's used in %1% events that will also b: It's used ku %1% events that will also be kususiwe
Items per page can be a minimum of %1% a: Items per ikhasi kungaba a minimum ye %1% futhi a maximum ye %2%
Keep current rights in descendants and a: Keep kwamanje rights ku descendants futhi engeza parent rights.
Label: Ilebula
Limit administrator functionality to one: Limit umlawuli functionality ku one noma okuningi IP addresses, separated by semicolons.
Link multiple digital objects to a singl: Xhumanisa izinto zedijithali eziningi nencazelo eyodwa yezinqolobane
Log creation and change of descriptions: Log creation futhi change ye izincazelo
MODS, Version 3.3. U.S. Library of Congr: MODS, Version 3.3. U.S. Library ye Congress
Make full width treeview collapsible on: Make full width treeview collapsible ku incazelo pages
Make it different from your username: Make it different kusuka ku your username
Make this selection the new default for: Make this selection the okusha default ye okukhona children
Merge saved clipboard with existing clip: Merge kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela nge okukhona ibhodi lokunamathisela results
Move failed: new and old positions requi: Move kuhlulekile: okusha futhi okudala positions kuyadingeka as numbers
Move not allowed: log in required: Move not allowed: log ku kuyadingeka
Move not allowed: not enough permissions: Move not allowed: not enough izimvume
Move not needed: new and old positions a: Move not needed: okusha futhi okudala positions are the same
Name: Igama
Name - A term with this name already exi: Igama - A itemu nge this igama already exists.
Name of the person(s) or organization(s): Igama ye the person(s) noma organization(s) which has the authority ku grant izimvume noma set rights imikhawulo.
No records were exported for your curren: Awekho amarekhodi akhishiwe ngokukhetha kwakho kwamanje. Sicela %open_link%uvuselele ikhasi bese ukhetha ezinye izinketho zokukhipha %close_link%.
Not a CSV file (or CSV columns not recog: Akulona ifayela le-CSV (noma amakholomu e-CSV awaziwa).
Note: Incorrect security settings can re: Inothi: Incorrect security izilungiselelo can result ku the AtoM web UI becoming inaccessible.
Note: While the date range update is run: Inothi: While the ibanga losuku update is running, the selected incazelo should not be edited.
Note: clipboard items unclipped in this: Inothi: ibhodi lokunamathisela items unclipped ku this ikhasi kuzoba removed kusuka ku the ibhodi lokunamathisela when the ikhasi is refreshed. You can re-khetha them now, noma reload the ikhasi ku susa them completely. Using the sort noma print preview buttons will also cause a ikhasi reload - so anything currently deselected kuzoba lost!
Off - validation is not run before CSV i: Kuvaliwe - ukuqinisekisa akuqhutshwa ngaphambi kokungenisa i-CSV
On reporting, the system will return thi: Ekubikeni, uhlelo luzobuyisa le nombolo yemigqa
Oops, we couldn't find any %1 level desc: Oops, we couldn't find any %1 level izincazelo.
Oops, we couldn't find any physical stor: Oops, we couldn't find any ukugcinwa ngokomzimba locations ye the kwamanje resource.
PDF page number for image derivative: PDF ikhasi number ye image derivative
Please %open_link%refresh the page%close: Sicela %open_link%refresh the ikhasi%close_link% ku see progress futhi a landa isixhumanisi when complete.
Sicela engeza a ifayela ku begin uploading.
Please check one or more of the export o: Sicela check one noma okuningi ye the khipha options.
Please clear the application cache and r: Sicela usule inqolobane yesicelo futhi wakhe kabusha inkomba yokusesha uma ushintsha isilungiselelo sesihlukanisi sekhodi yereferensi.
Please configure your site base URL: Sicela configure your site base URL
Please log in to access that page: Sicela ungene ukuze ufinyelele kulelo khasi
Please rebuild the search index after up: Sicela rebuild the inkomba yokusesha after uploading diacritics mappings.
Please rebuild the search index if you a: Sicela rebuild the inkomba yokusesha if you are adding okusha languages.
Sicela rebuild the inkomba yokusesha if you are enabling/disabling Markdown support.
Provide a brief description of the menu: Provide a brief incazelo ye the imenyu futhi it's purpose.
Provide a link to an external website or: Provide a isixhumanisi ku an external website noma an internal, symfony indlela (module/action).
Provide a menu label for users. For men: Nikeza ilebula yemenyu yabasebenzisi. Ezintweni zemenyu ezingabonakali (okungukuthi ezenhlangano kuphela), lokhu kufanele kushiywe kungenalutho.
Provide an internal menu name. This is: Provide an internal imenyu igama.  This is not visible ku abasebenzisi.
RAD, July 2008 version. Canadian Council: RAD, July 2008 version. Canadian Council ye Archives
Record a citation to, and/or information: Rekhoda ukucashunwa kanye/noma ulwazi ngokushicilelwa okuphathelene noma okusekelwe ekusetshenzisweni, ekutadisheni, noma ekuhlaziyweni kweyunithi yencazelo. Faka izinkomba kuma-facsimile noma imibhalo eshicilelwe. (ISAD 3.5.4)
Record a citation to, or information abo: Rekhoda ukucashunwa noma ulwazi mayelana nokushicilelwa okuphathelene noma okusekelwe ekusetshenzisweni, ekutadisheni, noma ekuhlaziyweni kwezinto ezichazwayo. Nikeza ulwazi olwanele ukukhombisa ubudlelwano phakathi kokushicilelwa neyunithi echazwayo. Lokhu kufaka izinhlelo ezinezichasiselo. (DACS 6.4.4)
Record notes on sources consulted in pre: Irekhodi amanothi ku imithombo consulted ku preparing the incazelo futhi who prepared it. (ISAD 3.7.1)
Record specialized or other important in: Rekhoda ulwazi olukhethekile noma olunye olubalulekile olungahlinzekwanga yinoma yiziphi izingxenye zencazelo ezichaziwe. (ISAD 3.6.1)
Record the name of the register which gr: Rekhoda igama lerejista ehlanganisa le nto yezinqolobane (njengezinto ezibukwayo nezizwakalayo, umsindo, imibhalo yesandla nezithombe). Sesha igama elikhona kumarekhodi erejista ngokuthayipha izinhlamvu zokuqala ezimbalwa zegama. Kungenjalo, cela ukuthi kudalwe ukufakwa okusha kwerejista. Umthetho we-NARSSA ka-1996
Record the name(s) of the person(s) who: Rekhoda amagama abantu abadale noma ababuyekeze incazelo, kanye nosuku lokudala noma lokubuyekeza. (DACS 8.1.5)
Record, as needed, information not accom: Irekhodi, as needed, ulwazi not accommodated by any ye the defined elements ye incazelo. (DACS 7.1.2)
Replace existing clipboard results with: Replace okukhona ibhodi lokunamathisela results nge kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela
Report generation has started, please ch: Umbiko generation has started, sicela check the imibiko ikhasi again soon.
Require SSL for all administrator funcio: Dinga i-SSL kuwo wonke umsebenzi womlawuli
Require SSL for all administrator functi: Dinga i-SSL kuwo wonke umsebenzi womlawuli

Izidingo: ifomethi ye-PNG, usayizi omkhulu 256K.

Review the current terms in the Levels o: Buyekeza amatemu akhona ohlelweni lwamazinga encazelo.
Saved clipboard maximum age (in days): Saved ibhodi lokunamathisela maximum age (ku days)
Search for an existing term in the place: Sesha itemu elikhona ohlelweni lokuhlukanisa izindawo ngokuthayipha izinhlamvu zokuqala ezimbalwa zegama lethemu. Kungenjalo, thayipha itemu elisha ukuze udale futhi uxhume itemu elisha lendawo.
Select a date range to overwrite:: Khetha a ibanga losuku ku overwrite:
Select a note type from the drop-down me: Khetha a inothi type kusuka ku the drop-down imenyu futhi faka inothi text ku accordance nge RAD 1.8B1 through 1.8B6.

Khetha a inothi type kusuka ku the drop-down imenyu futhi faka inothi text ku accordance nge the following sections ku RAD: 1.5E (Accompanying material); 1.8 B11 (Alpha-numeric designations); 1.8B9b (Ukunakekelwa); 1.8B7 (Edition); 1.8B9 (Ngokomzimba Incazelo); 1.8B16b (Rights).

Khetha a inothi type kusuka ku the drop-down imenyu futhi irekhodi, as needed, specialized ulwazi not accommodated by any ye the defined elements ye incazelo, including Ukunakekelwa (DACS 7.1.3), Citation (DACS 7.1.5), Alphanumeric designations (DACS 7.1.6), Variant isihloko ulwazi (DACS 7.1.7), noma Processing ulwazi (DACS 7.1.8).
Select the levels of description to be i: Khetha amazinga encazelo azofakwa ohlwini lwezinto. Uma kungekho mazinga akhethiwe, isixhumanisi sohlu lwezinto ngeke siboniswe. Ungasebenzisa okhiye be-control (Mac ⌘) kanye/noma u-shift ukuze ukhethe amanani amaningi kumenyu yamazinga encazelo.
Set if you want to combine the current s: Setha uma ufuna ukuhlanganisa isethi yamanje yamalungelo nanoma yimaphi amalungelo akhona, noma ususe amalungelo akhona bese usebenzisa la malungelo amasha
Set the default view template when brows: Set the default buka template when browsing izincazelo zezinqolobane
Set the default buka template when browsing izinqolobane zamarekhodi
Set the upload limit for this %1%: Set the layisha limit ye this %1%
Show available drafts notification upon: Show kuyatholakala drafts notification upon umsebenzisi login
Site base URL (used in MODS and EAD expo: Site base URL (used ku MODS futhi EAD exports)
Skipping file %{fileName} because file s: Skipping ifayela %{fileName} because ifayela size %{fileSize} is larger than ifayela size limit ye %{maxSize} MB
Slug was adjusted to remove special char: Slug was adjusted ku susa special characters noma
Some files failed to upload. Press the \: Some amafayela kuhlulekile ku layisha. Press the \\'Ngenisa\\' button ku continue importing anyways, noma press \\'Retry\\' ku re-attempt layisha.
Sorry, this Term is locked and cannot be: Uxolo, leli temu likhiyiwe futhi alikwazi ukusulwa
Sorry, you do not have permission to acc: Uxolo, awunayo imvume yokufinyelela kulelo khasi
Sorry, you do not have permission to mak: Uxolo, awunayo imvume yokwenza ukuhumusha kolimi lwe-%1%
Strict - validation is run; warnings wil: Strict - validation is run; warnings will halt ngenisa kusuka ku running
Strip file extensions from information o: Strip ifayela extensions kusuka ku ulwazi into amagama
Subject: Isihloko
Sync not allowed: log in required: Sync not allowed: log ku kuyadingeka
Text describing the license or agreement: Umbhalo ochaza ilayisense noma isivumelwano esinikeze imvume, noma isixhumanisi sombhalo ogcwele ogcinwe ku-inthanethi. Lokhu kungaqukatha umbhalo wangempela welayisense noma wesivumelwano, noma ukubeka ngamanye amazwi noma isifinyezo.
Text or HTML to display when sending cli: Text noma HTML ku bonisa when sending ibhodi lokunamathisela contents
The \"<strong>%dd%</strong>\" placeholde: The "%dd%" placeholder kuzoba replaced nge a incremental number (e.g. 'image 01', 'image 02')
The %open_link%job management page%close: The %open_link%umsebenzi management ikhasi%close_link% will bonisa progress futhi a landa isixhumanisi when complete.
The OAI-PMH API can be secured, optional: I-OAI-PMH API ingavikelwa, ngokuzikhethela, ngokudinga ukuthi izicelo ze-API ziqinisekiswe ngokusebenzisa okhiye be-API (abanikezwe abasebenzisi abathile).
The Title and Level of description value: The Isihloko futhi Izinga lencazelo values entered ku this ikhasi kuzoba applied ku each child incazelo kudaliwe ye the associated izinto zedijithali - '%dd%' represents an incrementing 2-value number, so by default izincazelo kudaliwe via this uploader kuzoba named image 01, image 02, etc.
The action which is permitted or restric: The action which is permitted noma restricted.
The beginning date of the permission gra: The beginning usuku ye the imvume granted.
The character separating hierarchical el: The character separating hierarchical elements ku a ikhodi yereferensi
The clipboard is empty for this entity t: Ibhodi lokunamathisela alinalutho ngalolu hlobo lwebhizinisi.
The code can only contain letters and nu: The code can only contain letters futhi numbers
The country or other political body that: The izwe noma other political body that has enacted the statute.
The izwe whose ilungelo lobunikazi laws apply.
The current version of the application: The kwamanje version ye the application
The usuku the ilungelo lobunikazi isimo applies.
The ending date of the permission grante: The ending usuku ye the imvume granted. Omit usuku lokugcina if the ending usuku is unknown.
The existing term values are required by: The okukhona itemu values are kuyadingeka by the application ku operate correctly
The following file will be deleted from: The following ifayela kuzoba kususiwe kusuka ku the ifayela system:
The maximum disk space of %1% GB availab: The maximum disk space ye %1% GB kuyatholakala ye uploading izinto zedijithali has been reached. Sicela contact your AtoM umlawuli wohlelo ku increase the kuyatholakala disk space.
The maximum disk space ye %1% GB kuyatholakala ye uploading izinto zedijithali has been reached. Sicela contact your umlawuli wohlelo ku increase the kuyatholakala disk space.
The maximum number of pixels on the long: The maximum number ye pixels ku the longest edge ye derived reference images.
The number of days a saved clipboard sho: The number ye days a kulondoloziwe ibhodi lokunamathisela should be retained before it is eligible ye deletion
The number of entities to include in a s: The number ye entities ku faka ku a single OAI response list before inserting a resumption token
The number of records shown per page on: The number ye amarekhodi shown per ikhasi ku list pages
The pdfinfo tool is required to use this: The pdfinfo tool is kuyadingeka ku use this functionality. Sicela contact your umlawuli wohlelo.
The related object(s) will <strong>not</: The related into(s) will not be kususiwe
The system is currently in read-only mod: The system is currently ku read-only mode. Sicela try again later.
The upload limit of %1% GB for <a href=\: The layisha limit ye %1% GB ye %3% has been exceeded (%4% GB currently used)
The layisha limit ye %1% GB ye %3% has been reached
The uploads directory has not been creat: The uploads directory has not been kudaliwe yet.
The username or e-mail address you enter: The username noma e-mail ikheli you entered is already ku use
There was an error loading the clipboard: Kube nephutha ekulayisheni okuqukethwe kwebhodi lokunamathisela.
This feature will not work until a Googl: This feature will not work until a Google Maps API key is specified ku the %1%global%2% izilungiselelo ikhasi.
This is a non-preferred term and cannot: This is a non-preferred itemu futhi akukwazi ukuba edited - sicela use %2%.
This is an auto-generated setting that p: This is an auto-generated setting that produces an OAI compliant inqolobane yamarekhodi isihlonzi, which includes the OAI inqolobane yamarekhodi code value if it is set
This is an example of the auto-generated: This is an example ye the auto-generated, OAI compliant isihlonzi which is kudaliwe ye each item ku this particular OAI inqolobane yamarekhodi
This isn't a valid email address: This isn't a valid i-imeyili ikheli
This term is used in %1% records. The te: This itemu is used ku %1% amarekhodi. The itemu kuzoba kususiwe kusuka ku these amarekhodi.
Lo msebenzisi unamanothi angu-%1% ohlelweni. La manothi ngeke asuswe, kodwa ukuhlobana kwawo nalo msebenzisi kuzosuswa.
This value can not be greater than %max%: Leli nani alikwazi ukuba ngaphezu kuka-%max% pixels
This value cannot be more than %max%: This value akukwazi ukuba okuningi than %max%
This value must be at least %min%: This value kufanele kube at least %min%
This value must be at least %min% pixels: This value kufanele kube at least %min% pixels

Unable to upload diacritics mapping yaml: Unable ku layisha diacritics mapping yaml ifayela.
Unable to upload diacritis mapping yaml: Unable ku layisha diacritis mapping yaml ifayela.
Update matches ignoring blank fields in: Update matches ignoring blank fields ku CSV
Updating an existing date range will per: Updating an okukhona ibanga losuku will permanently overwrite the kwamanje izinsuku.
Upload limit of %{maxPostSize} MB reache: Layisha limit ye %{maxPostSize} MB reached. Unable ku engeza additional amafayela.
Upload multi-page files as multiple desc: Layisha multi-ikhasi amafayela as multiple izincazelo
Uploaded finding aid could not be moved: Uploaded ithuluzi lokuthola amarekhodi could not be moved ku the downloads
Use any valid URI path segment and upper: Use any valid URI indlela segment futhi uppercase character ku slugs
Use the actor name field to link an auth: Sebenzisa inkambu yegama lomlingisi ukuxhumanisa irekhodi legunya nale ncazelo. Sesha igama elikhona kumarekhodi egunya ngokuthayipha izinhlamvu zokuqala ezimbalwa zegama. Kungenjalo, thayipha igama elisha ukuze udale futhi uxhume irekhodi legunya elisha.
Use these options to specify how the dat:
Use these options ku specify how the ibanga losuku returns results. "Exact" means
that the start futhi end izinsuku ye izincazelo returned kufanele fall entirely within
the ibanga losuku entered. "Overlapping" means that any incazelo whose start noma
end izinsuku touch noma overlap the target ibanga losuku kuzoba returned.
Use this interface to update the authori: Use this interface ku update the ifomu eligunyaziwe legama, slug (permalink), futhi/noma %1% filename.
Use this interface to update the descrip: Use this interface ku update the incazelo isihloko, slug (permalink), futhi/noma %1% filename.
Buka the full list ye descendants.
We couldn't find any results matching yo: We couldn't find any results matching your sesha.
We've redirected you to the first page o: We've redirected you ku the first ikhasi ye results. To avoid using vast amounts ye memory, AtoM limits pagination ku %1% amarekhodi. Sicela, narrow down your results.

We've redirected you ku the first ikhasi ye results. To avoid using vast amounts ye memory, AtoM limits pagination ku %1% amarekhodi. To buka the last amarekhodi ku the kwamanje result set, try changing the sort direction.
When disabled: Finding Aid links are not:
When disabled: Ithuluzi lokuthola amarekhodi izixhumanisi are not displayed, Ithuluzi lokuthola amarekhodi generation is
disabled, futhi the 'Advanced Sesha > Ithuluzi lokuthola amarekhodi' filter is hidden.
When enabled the following text will app: When enabled the following text will appear ku the %1% imethadatha section ku describe how a umsebenzisi may ukufinyelela the original futhi ukulondoloza copy ye the ifayela stored ku a linked yedijithali ukulondoloza system. The text appears ku the "Izimvume" field. When disabled, the "Izimvume" field is not displayed.

When enabled the following text will appear whenever a umsebenzisi tries ku landa a %1% master nge an associated isitatimende samalungelo where the Basis = ilungelo lobunikazi futhi the Ukuvinjelwa = conditional. You can style futhi customize the text as ku a static ikhasi.
When enabled, an &quot;Upload limit&quot: When enabled, an "Layisha limit" meter is displayed ye authenticated abasebenzisi ku the %1% buka ikhasi, futhi administrators can limit the disk space each %1% is allowed ye %2% uploads
When enabled, the copyright pop-up will: When enabled, the ilungelo lobunikazi pop-up kuzoba applied ku every %1%, regardless ye whether there is an accompanying Isitatimende samalungelo.
When set to &quot;no&quot;, the reposito: When set ku "cha", the inqolobane yamarekhodi igama is excluded kusuka ku certain displays because it kuzoba too repetitive
When set to &quot;yes&quot;, the referen: When set ku "yebo", the ikhodi yereferensi string kuzoba built using the ulwazi into isihlonzi plus the izihlonzi ye konke its ancestors
When set to 'yes' generated Finding Aids: When set ku 'yebo' generated Amathuluzi okuthola amarekhodi will khipha Drafts
You can check %1% page to determine the: You can check %1% ikhasi ku determine the kwamanje isimo ye the update umsebenzi.
You cannot show more than %max% hits per: You cannot bonisa okuningi than %max% hits per ikhasi
You may only clear jobs belonging to you: You may only clear imisebenzi belonging ku you.
You must show at least %min% hits per pa: You kufanele bonisa at least %min% hits per ikhasi
You will also be able to review and indi: You will also be able ku review futhi individually modify each incazelo isihloko ku the next ikhasi after clicking "Layisha."
Your %entity_type% export package is bei: Your %entity_type% khipha package is being built.
Your browser does not support JavaScript: Isiphequluli sakho asisekeli i-JavaScript. Bona %1%izidingo ezincane%2%.
Your description has been updated. Lower: Your incazelo has been kubuyekeziwe. Lower level izincazelo are being kubuyekeziwe now – check the umsebenzi scheduler ikhasi ye isimo futhi details.
Your edits to this description have been: Ukuhlela kwakho kule ncazelo kulondoloziwe futhi incazelo ibuyele esimweni sokusalungiswa. Sicela ucele umsebenzisi onezimvume ezanele ukuthi aphinde ashicilele incazelo ukuze ibonakale emphakathini.
Your password confirmation did not match: Ukuqinisekiswa kwephasiwedi yakho akufananga nephasiwedi yakho.
Your term has been updated. Its related: Your itemu has been kubuyekeziwe. Its izincazelo ezihlobene are being kubuyekeziwe asynchronously – check the umsebenzi scheduler ikhasi ye isimo futhi details.
